allow: Bash(mkdir -p kubernetes database infrastructure network security)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Sarvesh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Sarvesh-Projects\\aiops-assistant"; .\\venv\\Scripts\\python -m py_compile ingest.py; if \($?\) { "ingest.py compiles OK" }; Test-Path .\\chroma_db; if \(Test-Path .\\chroma_db\) { \(Get-ChildItem .\\chroma_db -Recurse | Measure-Object\).Count })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Sarvesh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Sarvesh-Projects\\aiops-assistant"; try { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .\\chroma_db -ErrorAction Stop; "Removed empty chroma_db successfully - folder was NOT locked anymore" } catch { "Still locked: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Sarvesh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Sarvesh-Projects\\aiops-assistant"; "chroma_db exists locally: $\(Test-Path .\\chroma_db\)"; if \(Test-Path .\\chroma_db\) { "items: $\(\(Get-ChildItem .\\chroma_db -Recurse | Measure-Object\).Count\)" }; "--- .gitignore ---"; Get-Content .gitignore | Select-String "chroma")

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Sarvesh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Sarvesh-Projects\\aiops-assistant"; $log = "$env:TEMP\\st_start.log"; $p = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","streamlit","run","app.py","--server.headless","true","--server.port","8599" -RedirectStandardOutput $log -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\st_err.log" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; if \(-not $p.HasExited\) { "PROCESS STILL RUNNING \(started OK\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force } else { "PROCESS EXITED early, code=$\($p.ExitCode\)" }; "===== STDOUT ====="; Get-Content $log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "===== STDERR ====="; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\st_err.log" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Sarvesh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Sarvesh-Projects\\aiops-assistant"; "--- Anything listening on 8501? ---"; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8501 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess; "Owning process:"; Get-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,StartTime } else { "Nothing listening on 8501 \(port is free\)" }; "--- Running python/streamlit processes ---"; Get-Process python,streamlit -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,StartTime)
